title: K-200 Nav/GNC Qualification Test Report
text:
# K-200 Nav/GNC Qualification Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-426-C. Revision: C. Type: test-report. Author: Tobias Wren. Created: 2023-11-24. Last modified: 2024-10-12. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Nav/GNC subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1132, P-1174, P-1025.
